chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. S-37 / 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ HEARING / PRIORITY 1) For orders on office objeciton. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 4681/2024. 3) For hearing of main case. 13.02.2026. None present for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Javed Khalid, DAG. ___________________ None present on behalf of the Petitioner. Same was the position on the last date of hearing i.e. 29.08.2024. It seems that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the instant Petition. The same is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Arshad/
